arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals reason Liverpool gave Mohamed Salah bumper contract extension - with £380,000-a-week star set to remain at Anfield until he is 35
arts.sum: Clubs are usually reluctant to continue paying players in their thirties around £350,000-a-week but Salah's statistics have improved with age as approaches his 33rd birthday.

arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is set to leave Liverpool for Real Madrid this summer but Reds boss Arne Slot insists the club will not be panicked into the transfer market

The 25-year-old French international will be out of contract in 2026, and he has not signed an extension with Liverpool yet.
